description_long: This is a full-sized, upright Coca-Cola vending machine with a predominantly red exterior and a large, glass-fronted display showcasing a variety of bottled and canned beverages. The front panel features a transparent window revealing several rows of drinks, illuminated for visibility, and a prominent Coca-Cola logo in white. Below the display window, there is a product retrieval slot with a metallic flap, and to the right, a payment interface with coin and bill acceptors, as well as a card reader. The machine's sides and back are solid red metal, with minimal detailing except for some minor surface marks. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, glossy finish typical of commercial vending machines. Branding and instructional stickers are visible on the front, enhancing its visual appeal and usability.
description: A large, red Coca-Cola vending machine with a glass display window, payment interface, and prominent branding. The front features visible drink selections, a retrieval slot, and multiple payment options.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display window with drinks, Coca-Cola branding, payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid red metal panel with minor surface marks and no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, solid red metal back panel with no branding or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain red metal surface and minor marks.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular illuminated display panel is located at the top front, behind glass, showing beverage selections and prices.
attribute_payment_interface: Located on the right side of the front panel, the payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, each with distinct slots and labeling.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual rectangular buttons are arranged vertically to the right of the display window, each labeled for a specific drink selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular metallic slot with a flap is located below the display window for retrieving purchased products.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large white Coca-Cola logo and branding are prominently displayed on the front panel, with additional smaller stickers and signage for instructions and product information.
